query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS withdrawal_config (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  withdrawals_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  minimum_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 50.00,
  maximum_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10000.00,
  commission_percentage DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  updated_by INT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT minimum_less_than_maximum CHECK (minimum_amount < maximum_amount),
  CONSTRAINT commission_valid CHECK (commission_percentage >= 0 AND commission_percentage <= 100)
);

INSERT INTO withdrawal_config (id, withdrawals_enabled, minimum_amount, maximum_amount, commission_percentage)
SELECT UUID(), TRUE, 50.00, 10000.00, 10.00
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM withdrawal_config LIMIT 1);
